title: Relentless Mobs
description: Makes (almost) all mobs pursue players from any distance and through blocks, increasing difficulty and intensity in survival gameplay!
body:
**Relentless Mobs:**

**If you showcase this mod, please credit me in the video by adding a link to the mod or a shoutout! It helps :)**

NOTICE: THIS MOD IS IN BETA AND YOU MAY ENCOUNTER PERFORMANCE ISSUES, PERFORMANCE MODS HIGHLY RECOMENDED.

Prepare to survive against smarter, more aggressive mobs!

This mod increases the danger in Minecraft by making mobs relentlessly hunt players. Once they detect a player, they will pursue and attack (passive mobs will not attack) with improved coordination. Perfect for hardcore survival or challenge maps.

**Features:**

Mobs actively seek out players from farther away.

Mobs can see through blocks.

Designed for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge).

Compatible with most mob-enhancing mods.

 

This mod was based off Torchy's Youtube Video: [Beating Minecraft But Mobs ALWAYS See You](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qjFUuFi6UyA&t=1422s)

**If you liked this mod, consider supporting my goal on on Ko-fi 😄**

**If you play Roblox, consider testing my friend’s Roblox game by joining: https://www.roblox.com/games/5465638320**
